name: Whole Wheat Sourdough
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Whole wheat starter (you can use your own)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in the DAK.
2. Turn the light/dark setting to 12 o'clock and set the menu to Sweet Bread (the auto mode, not manual).
3. At the beeps, add 3/4 cup pecans (or walnuts if available). Use large pieces as they will be cut up during kneading.
4. Experiment with adding raisins, oatmeal, or seeds in future batches.
5. Enjoy your homemade whole wheat sourdough bread!
